title: The I Got A Feeling Collab [reupload]
description:
Originally hosted by jab https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFTV1Lt_JP28apqfidJgpTg

This video is NOT a collaboration, this video is a JABCollaboration!
Since the King of my Castle Jabcollab became a successful outcome, I decided to keep
moving foward and host another jabcollab for 2014. 

I would like to deticate this collab to my first dog and best friend Jasper, a special
companion that has been with me all my life who passed away on March 17th 2014, 17 years old. This one's
for you old pal!

Participants in order:
